improvements.change: Require implementors to run shellcheck-style pass for workflow scripts to catch unbound variables when using 'set -euo pipefail'.
Explicitly require searching all workflow files for Azure login credential sourcing to avoid partial OIDC migrations.
Require adding or updating CI policy checks that prevent regressions for security requirements (e.g., disallow secrets.AZURE_* in azure/login blocks).
Require a dedicated security findings artifact that records executed commands, results, and any manual validation follow-ups when sandbox limitations exist.
